overall.description: Gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a character in a fur cloak first approaching a gothic castle under a crimson sky, then transitioning via a loading screen to an underground eternal city with a starry ceiling. The character explores ancient stone ruins, walking through colonnades and ascending stairs in a atmospheric low-light environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic castle approach under crimson sky

events.description: screen fades to black as character reaches the castle gate threshold

agents.ego_description: sprinting toward the massive gothic castle gate with red glowing barrier

entered.detail: tall dark stone towers with pointed gothic architecture
ominous blood-red sky covering the entire horizon
twisted black tree with glowing red orbs hanging from branches
massive fortified gate with red magical barrier grid

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a desolate landscape toward an imposing gothic castle under a blood-red sky. Dead trees and crimson grass line the path as the camera follows from behind, approaching the castle's main gate which glows with a red magical barrier before the screen fades to black.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground eternal city overlook with starry sky

events.description: fade in from black revealing underground ruins with blue starry sky ceiling
character turns left and begins walking along the cliffside path

agents.ego_description: walking along the edge of underground ruins observing the distant illuminated architecture

entered.detail: blue-purple starry night sky with nebula clouds covering the cavern ceiling
glowing golden-orange structure visible across the underground chasm
low stone barrier along the edge of the cliff overlook
broken stone archway framing the starry sky
large rocks and debris scattered along the path

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an underground eternal city with a breathtaking starry sky ceiling. The character walks along a stone balcony overlooking a vast chasm, with a distant glowing palace visible across the void. The environment shifts from red exterior to blue-purple underground lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient colonnade with towering stone columns

events.description: entering the covered colonnade area from the open overlook

agents.ego_description: walking through the ancient colonnade passing between massive stone pillars and arches

entered.detail: massive cylindrical stone pillars supporting the high ceiling
series of repeating archways creating depth perspective
large stone figure standing at the end of the colonnade
weathered stone tiles with grass growing between cracks

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered colonnade with towering stone columns and repeating arches. The starry sky is visible through the open sides while the path leads toward a distant stone statue. The environment is darker and more enclosed than the previous overlook area.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase ascending between high walls

events.description: beginning to ascend the wide stone staircase toward the archway exit

agents.ego_description: climbing the ancient stone stairs toward the large archway opening at the top

entered.detail: wide worn stone steps leading upward between walls
tall stone archway at the top of the stairs framing the starry sky

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide stone staircase flanked by high walls, climbing toward a large archway exit that frames the starry sky above. The camera follows the steady climb upward, transitioning from the colonnade to the higher elevation platform.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a desolate, blood-red wasteland into the ethereal depths of a subterranean starry city. It begins with the character running through crimson grass and dead trees toward an imposing gothic castle, moving closer to a glowing red magical barrier before the screen fades. As the scene transitions, the oppressive red light shifts to a cool blue-purple palette, opening up to a vast underground chasm where a distant glowing palace sits beneath a breathtaking starry ceiling. The camera then follows the character into a more enclosed colonnade of towering stone columns and repeating arches, moving through the shadows toward a distant statue. Finally, the path leads upward as the character ascends a wide stone staircase, climbing toward a high archway that frames the celestial sky above.
